description: Modern Web Systems — agency marketing site (Next.js 16, Tailwind 4, motion/react) at modernwebsystems.com

tasks.title: Victor & Ian proposal + Stripe invoice page (/invoices/victor-ian)
tasks.note: Shipped + deployed (c91dd48). Live Stripe invoice MDSEIGCQ-0001 ($2,000 due 2026-06-10) on Modernwebsystems account; page noindexed, not in nav. Key decision: $2,000 one-time build + $100/mo upkeep (Sam confirmed); customer has Sam's email (Stripe requires one for send_invoice — Sam delivers link himself).

tasks.title: Homepage V2 redesign at /v2 (noindexed preview)
tasks.note: Shipped 47ea32e + review-fix 5d33dd1. Signature HeroRig build-sequence, 11 conversion-ordered sections, every number derived from constants. Full 4-agent review: template.tsx LCP gate fixed site-wide, font-800->font-extrabold (v4 no-op class), reduced-motion counter gating, $5K pricing synced incl. ContactForm bracket. Throttled LCP 996ms, CLS 0. Sam decides: promote to / and roll language to other pages.

tasks.title: Promote /v2 to homepage + roll language to subpages
tasks.note: Sam approved. v2 -> src/app/home-{client,data}, /v2 301s to /, noindex lifted, own openGraph block. Promoted: interaction tokens -> lib/animations, V2Counter logic -> AnimatedCounter (locale commas, hydration-safe reduced-motion, decimal-exact so 99.7% never shows 100%), LineIcon/Seam/GlowCTA/OpsFlow extracted. 11 legacy sections + 5 orphaned UI components + 4 dead constants deleted. PageHero orbs (infinite loops) -> static gradient; CTABanner -> warm band + GlowCTA; services font-900 no-op -> font-black; about height anim -> scaleY; DrawCheckmark dead delay fixed (drawPathDelayed). Commits e348b25..589628e.

features.name: Client proposal/invoice pages
features.what: One-off noindexed proposal pages under /invoices/<client> with hard-coded Stripe hosted-invoice facts in page.tsx (single INVOICE object) and the full design in a sibling 'use client' file
features.how: Pattern reference: src/app/invoices/victor-ian/ — copy the folder for future invoices; fleet imagery via nano-banana into public/invoices/<client>/
features.connections: Reuses ui kit (SectionWrapper, GlowCard, AnimatedHeading, Stagger*), lib/animations variants, Stripe MCP (stripe-modernwebsystems) for invoice creation

features.name: Homepage (promoted v2 redesign)
features.what: Conversion-ordered 11-section homepage at / — HeroRig signature build-sequence, proof bar, PAS pain, results gallery, triptych, OpsFlow, math band, build log, pricing, FAQ, warm CTA close
features.how: src/app/home-client.tsx + home-data.ts; all numbers derive from lib/constants at module load; interaction tokens from lib/animations
features.connections: Shared promotions consumed site-wide: AnimatedCounter (/work, /work/[slug]), GlowCTA + Seam (CTABanner everywhere), LineIcon, OpsFlow (sections/), tokens (services, about, DrawCheckmark)

decisions.title: Stripe customer email workaround
decisions.decision: Stripe rejects send_invoice invoices for email-less customers; created customer 'Victor & Ian' with sam@ovington.io so Stripe emails route to Sam and he shares the hosted link directly (Sam chose no client email).
decisions.consequence: First customer record cus_Ug4M80pbLl4PLJ is orphaned (no email, no invoice) — harmless; deletable in dashboard.

decisions.title: Page-local design system extensions
decisions.decision: Proposal page keeps ocean-blue palette, wave dividers, icons, and vignettes in-file (no globals.css/Navbar/Footer edits); shared token VALUES referenced via CSS vars, never re-hard-coded.
decisions.consequence: Future invoices copy the folder; globals stay untouched.

decisions.title: Pricing repositioned to $5K floor + retainers
decisions.decision: Sam set homepage floor at $5,000 with monthly retainers (ongoing dev, AI agent orchestration, fractional CTO); services FAQ + contact-form budget brackets synced; $15K-$50K stays as the 'most website engagements land' range.
decisions.consequence: All public pricing surfaces now agree; /v2, /services, /contact.

decisions.title: Florida governing law in /terms §12
decisions.decision: Sam chose Florida; neutral 'state in which MWS is organized' wording replaced with State of Florida (law + venue).
decisions.consequence: Terms are now jurisdiction-specific; any future entity move needs a §12 edit.

decisions.title: No Stripe key rotation
decisions.decision: Sam declined rotating the restricted Stripe key that appeared in chat history ('not rotating keys stop asking').
decisions.consequence: Standing: do not re-raise unless a NEW exposure event occurs. Recorded in auto-memory.

openQuestions.question: Repo ZeroPercentSam/mws is PUBLIC — live Stripe hosted-invoice URL + client names/pricing are world-readable in source. Make repo private, or accept exposure?

completed: Live Stripe invoice MDSEIGCQ-0001 created via MCP ($2,000, due 2026-06-10, customer cus_Ug4NvOkhzdr1Io, product prod_Ug4MkQKJR2lFMv, price price_1TgiDoCzuo5EmjWW53SKhOJU)

Built /invoices/victor-ian (page.tsx + proposal-client.tsx) — hero, exec-summary letter, fleet cards w/ nano-banana imagery, animated approval-flow stepper, sitemap showcase (16 pages), 1-week timeline, pricing, glowing Pay Invoice CTA

Full code review (7 angles, motion semantics source-verified) + fixes: per-value transitions, variant-embedded delays, dasharray/pathLength conflict, wave overscan + whileInView gating, CSS-var tokens, printable PDF CSS, single INVOICE config object
OG card for proposal (opengraph-image convention) + real Schaefer photos swap
Footer socials removed; founder section removed from /about
/privacy + /terms (firecrawl-researched, honest to data reality) + cookie notice banner + metadataBase -> custom domain
/v2 homepage redesign built, 4-agent reviewed, fixed, deployed (LCP 996ms throttled, CLS 0); site-wide template.tsx LCP gate fixed

Mobile flicker root-caused + fixed (globals blanket backface rule, navbar 24px backdrop-blur on scroll, permanent willChange/backface layer pins in FadeInWhenVisible/StaggerItem/AnimatedHeading, layout-prop animation in v2 pipeline vignette, blend/blur gating); frozen marquee/static rig reproduced under prefers-reduced-motion emulation = OS setting, not a bug
v2 tagline -> 'shipped in days, not months' + section contrast pass (service tints orange/blue/gold, deep-ocean math band, gradient hero accent, warm CTA close)
Site-wide font-800 -> font-extrabold sweep (14x, headings were silently weight-400)

Victor & Ian invoice split: MDSEIGCQ-0001 ($2,000) VOIDED; MDSEIGCQ-0002 ($1,000 due 2026-06-10) live + linked on page; completion $1,000 staged as Stripe DRAFT in_1TgnbpCzuo5EmjWWuHL4wnU7 (finalize when build ships); page shows $2,000 total + split terms; restricted key now in .project/secrets.local.json (gitignored, 600)
sessions.nextStep: FINALIZE STRIPE DRAFT in_1TgnbpCzuo5EmjWWuHL4wnU7 ($1,000 completion invoice) when Victor & Ian build ships. Sam pending: /v2 promote-to-/ decision + Codex review; rotate Stripe restricted key (now in .project/secrets.local.json); repo public/private (Q-001); governing-law state for /terms §12; re-test mobile after flicker fixes (check Reduce Motion setting).

completed: Promoted /v2 to homepage (e20bc45): home-{client,data}, /v2 permanent redirect, noindex lifted, turbopack.root pinned, 11 legacy sections + 4 orphan UI components deleted

Review fixes (7425485): AnimatedCounter hydration-safe reduced-motion + decimal-exact formatting (99.7% bug), DrawCheckmark dead delay -> drawPathDelayed, EASE literals deduped, OpsFlow geometry derived from steps.length, homepage openGraph block, #contact anchor restored, dead homepage constants removed

Rolled v2 language to subpages (589628e): PageHero static gradient (orb infinite loops deleted), CTABanner warm band + GlowCTA, services font-900 no-op -> font-black, about height-anim -> scaleY, /work double-border fix

Verification: next build green, Playwright smoke all routes + /work/[slug] + /blog/[slug], zero console errors incl. prefers-reduced-motion pass; scripts/verify-promotion.mjs committed as regression guard
sessions.nextStep: Poll prod for 589628e markers (homepage tagline + /v2 308). Remaining Sam items: repo PUBLIC decision (flip private on go), finalize Victor & Ian draft invoice in_1TgnbpCzuo5EmjWWuHL4wnU7 when boat-platform build ships, mobile re-test on Sam's phone.
